description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the precommit, publish-gitlab-release, and publish-to-pypi components. Define two stages: test and release. In the test stage add a test job that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/thelabnyc/python:${IMAGE}, runs in parallel across a matrix of IMAGE values py312 and py313 with corresponding TOX_SKIP_ENV variables (^((?!py312-)) and ^((?!py313-))) set, executes the shell commands pip install tox then tox, and captures test coverage using the regex /^TOTAL.+?(\d+\%)$/. The job has no explicit rules, caches, or artifacts, and runs on all branches. The release stage jobs are provided by the included components.
